MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CHRYSLER GROUP LLC IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
